prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年安徽大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约11175名→12419名→12442名→13276名→16109名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约3667名；2025年基准约16109名，较2024年后移2833名，与当年招生计划大幅缩减直接相关；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为16人，2024年缩减至14人，2025年进一步缩减至8人；2026年计划恢复至15人，较2025年扩招约87.5%，扩招幅度显著，对位次有较大后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第101名，近年排名在90–104名之间波动，整体层次稳定，属中游211院校；2023年声誉评价为偏负面（涉及师德师风事件），2026年无该校声誉条目；抖音综合热度排名第84位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等偏低；未见明显投档断档或录取异常记录；第五轮学科评估。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年上海市普通高考考生约66700人，较2025年49276人增长约35.4%，增幅显著，竞争明显加剧；上海市本科批；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，在上海属于外地招生，2025年仅招8人、2026年恢复至15人，招生规模较小，受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（87.5%）带来的位次后移压力，以及上海市考生总数显著增长（+35.4%）带来的竞争加剧效应，两者对冲后扩招效应仍占主导。在2025年基准16109名基础上，预测2026年最低录取位次约22566名，区间22066–23066名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（22066–23066名）内建议以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（即小于22066名）可重点冲刺一档的电气工程及其自动化、数据科学与大数据技术等工科专业；位次接近区间上限（23066名附近）建议以三档专业保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Anhui University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 11175 → 12419 → 12442 → 13276 → 16109, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3667 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 16109, a backward shift of 2833 places from 2024, directly related to the significant reduction in the enrollment plan for that year; the enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Shanghai: 16 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 14 in 2024, further reduced to 8 in 2025; the 2026 plan is to restore to 15 students, an increase of about 87.5% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, exerting considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is about 101st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 90 and 104, indicating a stable overall level, belonging to mid-tier 211 universities; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), with no reputation entry for the university in 2026; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 84th, rated as average, with medium to low exposure on short video platforms; no obvious admission gaps or abnormal admission records; fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% from 49,276 in 2025, with significant growth and intensified competition; Shanghai undergraduate batch; Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, and is an out-of-province enrollment in Shanghai, with only 8 students admitted in 2025 and restored to 15 in 2026, with a small enrollment scale, limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the downward pressure on rankings from the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (87.5%), and the intensified competition effect from the significant increase in the number of candidates in Shanghai (+35.4%), the expansion effect still dominates after offsetting. Based on the 2025 baseline of 16109, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 22566, with a range of 22066–23066.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (22066–23066), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (i.e., less than 22066), you can focus on Tier 1 engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Data Science and Big Data Technology; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 23066), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
